extra.reason: Decided: parody brewery names, localStorage leaderboard behind a LeaderboardStore interface (backend swappable later), keyboard-only controls for MVP. Recorded in docs/GAME_DESIGN.md

Vite+TS+Phaser scaffold complete: Boot/Menu/Game/Results scenes, placeholder ride, LeaderboardStore over localStorage, strict tsc build passing, full loop verified in browser. Build docs added to CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md.

Implemented and verified in browser: diagonal-scroll riding with steering/speed, road-edge and cone collisions, crash/lives/finish states; BuzzSystem with staged drift, input lag, wobble, mirrored inputs, sway, vignette, mushy response. Dev keys B/N feed Buzz until beercycle-az9 lands.

Implemented and verified in browser: diagonal-scroll riding with steering/speed, road-edge and cone collisions, crash/lives/finish states; BuzzSystem with staged drift, input lag, wobble, mirrored inputs, sway, vignette, mushy response. Dev keys B/N feed Buzz until beercycle-az9 lands.

Trigger zones, chug timing minigame with accuracy scoring and PERFECT POUR bonus, streak multiplier, escalating Buzz per beer, repeat rounds with faster marker, exit back to riding. Verified in browser: both stops triggered, +88 (x1) and +160/+230 (x2 streak) scored, Buzz meter filled.
HUD was done with core riding; menu existed; added P pause overlay and the Boulder Bugle newspaper results screen with outcome headlines and highlighted high-score list. Verified in browser.

Peds/dogs/geese/car doors with collisions and near-miss style points; water/taco/tube/happy-hour/kombucha pickups with popups; BUI cop with suspicion meter and citation ending + Bugle headline. Verified in browser: dog collision crash, pickup effects, busted headline. Balance tuning left for playtesting.

Programmatic pixel-art pipeline: full sprite set from pixel maps + canvas-drawn sky/Flatirons/clouds/brewery facade, pedal animation, parallax, menu art. Texture keys swappable for Aseprite PNGs later. Verified in browser.
Runtime WebAudio chiptune: bass+lead loop, full SFX set, Buzz-linked detune warble, mute toggle, autoplay-safe lazy init. Verified context running and sequencer scheduling in browser.

Repo made public per user; GitHub Pages enabled with workflow source; Actions workflow builds Vite and deploys dist/ on push to main. Live and verified at https://guifreelife.com/beercycle/ (account-level custom domain applies to project pages).

Route data format + loader with 3 routes (Pearl St, The Hill, East Boulder), per-route palettes/hazards/breweries, carried run state, interim vs final results pages. Flatirons backdrop was done in beercycle-5rl. Verified route chain in browser. Flagstaff bonus stage filed as follow-up.

All four shipped in commit 2d22159: 24x24 code-drawn portraits x8 states per rider, menu character select + polaroid trio splash, reactive Doom-style HUD portrait with Buzz rocking, per-avatar bike sprite variants incl. helmetless HOSKINS. Verified select cycling, portrait state transitions (hammered->sober, sweat), and variant textures in browser.

Epic complete: names DWNWRD/HOSKINS/DRELLIS locked, all child tasks shipped and verified. Reminder to user: confirm the friends are OK with likenesses in the public game before sharing wide.

Shipped in e4b41bc: beers.ts data model with ABV/style formulas and 20 parody beers across 9 breweries; glassware + glyph textures and accent-themed chug panel; tap PICK phase + timing/jitter/fill mechanics + heavy/refresh/chili riding effects; vocab.ts rider lines wired into panel, crash popups, and Bugle quotes. Verified in browser: Mountain Moon tap list w/ DRELLIS enter line, FM PILS timing lock, PUCK'S PORTER overfill FOAM + heavy-legs timer + correct Buzz math, Bugle DRELLIS quote.

Epic complete; all children shipped and verified.

Unified pointer input shipped in 9132443: touch-steer toward finger through the Buzz pipeline, on-screen +/- speed buttons (3 active pointers), tap-select/tap-order/tap-slam/hold-pour in the chug panel with ONE MORE / RIDE ON buttons, tap-to-advance menus and Bugle, zoom/scroll gestures suppressed. Verified in an 812x375 pane with real pointer events: rider select taps, tap-to-start, touch steering (steered clear off the road and crashed - it works), tap-order LUNAR HAZE with CLEAN COMMIT perfect, RIDE ON exit, Bugle tap-advance. Follow-up noted: no pause/bail equivalent on touch.

LAST CALL GameOverScene shipped: black/red palette, flickering neon, crash tableau (toppled bike + dead portrait + orbiting stars) and BUI tableau (cop + citation #420), vocab epitaph, sad-trombone sting, leaderboard submit moved here for failures; Bugle reserved for transitions and victory. Both variants verified in browser incl. red high-score entry.

Shipped: darts + flight house games mapped per-brewery (6 venues), 3-beer tab with vocab cutoff, buffered result inputs, idle auto-return, foam mulligan. Browser-verified: darts 3-throw loop +130 with auto-return and one-shot button; flight [0,0,1,2] tap-repeat +480 exact; cutoff after 3 beers; mulligan once then foam scoring +176 exact.

Nine researched procedural interiors shipped and verified in browser (Mountain Moon tapestry den, Best Flanders stained glass, Aviary barrel wall confirmed visually; all nine generated). Unblocks beercycle-zgh.

Shipped: per-route road width + sine centerline with segmented road rendering, all world objects centerline-relative (spawns, collisions, triggers, bounds); Bugle transition marquee with brewery glyphs/glasses/names + hazard forecast. Verified in browser: THE HILL renders visibly curved and narrow with carried state; transition page shows Upslip/Sanitastic marquee and forecast.
Shipped: public/favicon.svg pixel beer mug in game gold, relative path (subpath-safe), verified rendering at scale and 200 on the game page.

JillBake added as 4th rider: 8-state portrait (blue hair, red mirrored shades, nose studs, pink hoodie), bike sprite variant, voice lines, trait card. Menu/Game/Results/GameOver flows verified in headless Chromium.

PEN added as 5th rider: 8-state portrait (brown half-up hair, open/chill eyes, big grin, lavender tee, crossbody strap), bike variant with strap detail, smooth-jazz voice lines. Verified menu/ride/LAST CALL in headless Chromium.

AAFRAN added as 6th rider: 8-state portrait (ash-brown bob, raised brow, heavy-lidded gray-blue stare, flat mouth, nose stud, black tank, star tattoo, gold necklace), bike variant, stern-professor voice lines. Verified menu/ride/LAST CALL in headless Chromium.

Renamed id pen->plkstr, name PEN->PLKSTR, initials PEN->PLK across pixelart/vocab. Verified rider card, LAST CALL epitaph, and PLK leaderboard entry in headless Chromium. Old localStorage selections fall back to default rider.

Menu polaroid stream: 7 gag polaroids (group shot + one per rider) cycling every 3.8s with drop-in tween. Scenes collaged from existing textures (geese, cop, taco, tube, cones, dartboard, pint). Verified full cycle, wrap-around, caption fit, and rider select coexistence in headless Chromium.

Rider-select arrows now backed by 44x64 invisible tap zones (vs ~11x25px text bounds); glyphs bumped 18->20px. Verified via Playwright touch emulation: off-glyph taps register on both arrows, cycling works, background tap still starts ride.

AudioContext now auto-resumes on any pointerdown/touchend/tab-return (main.ts hook); unmute revives the ctx; touchable sound toggles with live state added to Menu (replaces M: mute text) and GameScene button cluster (steer exclusion widened). Verified via Playwright touch: labels toggle, forced ctx.suspend() recovers on next random touch.

VIEW_SCALE=1.3 world zoom via projection-axis scaling (gameplay math untouched in d/lat space) + ANCHOR moved (150,185)->(205,190) to center the road corridor; all world sprites scaled to match; HUD portrait 1.5->2.0. Verified: framing centered, both shoulders clean, no popping at speed, brewery overlay/zones fine.

popup() gains a full-alpha hold phase (default 350ms; crash vocab lines 1500ms) before the 900ms fade — crash lines now ~2.4s on screen vs 0.9s. Font 9->10px with dark stroke for contrast. Verified crash popups legible over grass in headless Chromium.

Transition Bugle: rider portrait (2x smug face + name) beside 9px ink quote, high-scores table removed (final page keeps it; final witness line drops the score since the table shows it). Roadside highway-green sign fixture at length-70 announcing ENTERING <next> / BOULDER CITY LIMITS. Per-route chiptune styles (bass/lead/tempo) switched in GameScene create. Verified all 3 routes end-to-end in headless Chromium.

BOULDER CANYON route added as route 4: narrow (92) twisty (curveAmp 56) climb to Ned, continuous creek ribbon on the left bank, crags + pines on the right, TANGLED STUMP and PRETTY DECENT parody breweries, NEDICATED dispensary, canyon minor-arpeggio music style, final sign now NEDERLAND ELEV 8236. Verified riding, scenery, sign, and final Bugle in headless Chromium.

Dispensaries live on Pearl (HERBAL HANDS), East Boulder (THE PHARM STAND), and the canyon (NEDICATED): storefront texture w/ green cross, shoulder stop zones, edible menu panel (MILE HIGH GUMMIES buzz-15/+150, COUCH LOCK BROWNIE +300 heavy legs, UPHILL SATIVA TAFFY +200 boost), one per customer, tipsy status-face inside. Music switches to reggae groove (one-drop bass rests + offbeat staccato skanks) while browsing, restores on exit/endRun. Verified menu, purchase, auto-exit in headless Chromium.
